parameters.query:
WITH expired AS (
  SELECT lock_key, tenant_id, contact_id, channel
  FROM lia_conversation_locks
  WHERE expires_at <= NOW()
),
convos_to_unlock AS (
  SELECT c.id
  FROM lia_conversations c
  JOIN expired e
    ON c.tenant_id = e.tenant_id
   AND c.contact_id = e.contact_id
   AND c.channel = e.channel
  WHERE c.status = 'human_takeover'
),
unlock_update AS (
  UPDATE lia_conversations
  SET status = 'active'
  WHERE id IN (SELECT id FROM convos_to_unlock)
  RETURNING id
),
deleted AS (
  DELETE FROM lia_conversation_locks
  WHERE expires_at <= NOW()
  RETURNING lock_key
)
SELECT
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM deleted) AS locks_deleted,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM unlock_update) AS conversations_unlocked;
